buildCommand: bash -c 'curl -o flutter.tar.xz https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.5-stable.tar.xz && tar xf flutter.tar.xz && export PATH=$PATH:$PWD/flutter/bin && flutter doctor && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=API_URL=$API_URL'
devCommand: echo 'Dev mode not supported on Vercel for Flutter'
